contents.title: collectiveinterest | Fashion Photo & Video Productions for Global Brands
contents.generated_title: collectiveinterest | Fashion Photo & Video Productions for Global Brands
contents.description_html: We produce timeless fashion photography and film that feels new — connecting brands with the next generation. contents.title: PARSEL
contents.description_html: PARSEL designs high-performance EVA tote bags and modular bag systems for travel, work, and everyday use. Each precision-engineered bag component connects, detaches, and reconfigures for smart organization, durable storage, and versatile carry solutions that adapt to your lifestyle.

Each precision-engineered bag component connects, detaches, and reconfigures for smart organization, durable storage, and versatile carry solutions that adapt to your lifestyle.

contents.title: SofaKnows: Creative director, CEO, Artist
contents.description_html: SofaKnows is a multidisciplinary artist with no limitations. Her work exists at the intersection of boundaries — tattooing, filmmaking, jewelry design, and creative direction. Each project is a reflection of her vision: to challenge conventions and find new ways to connect through art.

contents.description_html: APR Instruments sviluppa strumenti innovativi per l’analisi e il trattamento di pelle e capelli. contents.title: RIMA — Rima
contents.description_html: RIMA is a furniture gallery in Cracow, but more than that, it’s a place for people who see interiors as a reflection of who they are. We curate furniture with character—vintage pieces with a story to tell and contemporary designs that redefine how we live with objects.
contents.description: RIMA is a furniture gallery in Cracow, but more than that, it’s a place for people who see interiors as a reflection of who they are. We curate furniture with character—vintage pieces with a story to tell and contemporary designs that redefine how we live with objects.

contents.title: LE TUFFEAU | Cave à vin.
contents.description_html: Le Tuffeau is the long-nursed dream of troglodytic cousins David and Will Murray. A cave tucked away in the limestone-clad recesses of Melbourne's Nicholas Building with a hand-picked selection of fine wines representing their divers tastes
